frontmatter.description: A TLS certificate has fewer than 14 days remaining before expiry

signature.embedding_seed: tls certificate expiring renewal acme letsencrypt

body:
## When this fires
A monitoring check has flagged a certificate with under two weeks of validity. Causes typically split between auto-renewal failing silently, manual certs that no one owns, and a DNS-01 challenge breaking after a domain change.

## Playbook
1. Run cert-details on the affected hostname to capture issuer, SANs, and exact expiry.
2. Tail renewal-job-log to see whether the most recent renewal attempt failed and why.
3. Confirm issuer-status is green before retrying renewal.
